title: Delicate Velvety Turkish Turkey Papillote
description: A fresh and cozy Turkish dish featuring tender turkey, flavorful spices, and a delicate papillote presentation, perfect for a low-glycemic diet. This dish is made with wholesome ingredients and careful cooking techniques.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, onion, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the turkey pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cut a large piece of parchment paper into a rectangle, about 18 inches by 12 inches.
Place the turkey mixture in the center of the parchment paper, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the parchment paper over the turkey, creating a tight seal, and twist the ends to form a papillote.
Place the papillote on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the papillote from the oven and carefully open the parchment paper.
Pour the lemon juice and chicken broth over the turkey and return to the oven for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
